text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Owie... Guess what happened! I just saw<n>a girl
over there with an interesting<n>walk...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Umu, I thought to myself, maybe that<n>walk is the
secret to her speed! What if<n>she's training her
pivot foot or<n>something?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So... I tried copying her walk! But while<n>my eyes
were on her...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I walked into a post—bonk! My<n>face—bam! Hng...
Maybe I should first<n>start with watching where I'm
going...
